title: derris pulchra
intro: Derris pulchra, also known as the showy derris, is a flowering plant in the pea family. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions. The plant is rich in rotenone, a toxic compound with analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including pain relief, wound healing, and infection prevention. Derris pulchra can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or topical applications, and its extracts are also used in traditional medicine.
